fields.description: 'Additional Qty' = more qty for an item already in the original BOQ. 'New Item' = brand-new item not in the original BOQ.
fields.label: Line Type

fields.description: For Additional Qty lines: boq_row_uid of the original BOQ row this scope extends. For New Item lines: leave blank (auto-cleared on save).
fields.label: Original BOQ Row UID

fields.description: Service category from Item Group 'Work Order Items'.
fields.label: Summary Head

fields.description: Per-row tax percentage. 0 means no tax on this row.
fields.label: Tax %

fields.description: Auto-calculated as qty x rate (WITHOUT tax).
fields.label: Amount

fields.description: This scope's own deviation tolerance for additional billing against the variation line.
fields.label: Deviation Limit %

fields.description: Stable UUID for this variation line. Distinct from any original BOQ row's UID; RA Bill Items reference this UID for variation-scope billing.
fields.label: BOQ Row UID

fields.description: Open a dialog listing the parent Work Order's BOQ rows and click one to auto-fill this Additional Qty line (summary_head, uom, item_no, description, rate, tax_pct, deviation_limit_pct). For New Item lines this button does nothing.
fields.label: Pick Original
